author: TwoAbove
name: Heterogeneous Data Ordering + LR Peak on AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA stack
blurb: Heterogeneous (diverse-together) data ordering via per-token PCA scoring + LR peak overshoot (2x) on the PR #1019 stack. Data ordering reorders training sequences so consecutive batches see maximally diverse content, improving gradient quality at zero parameter/compute cost.
technique_summary: Heterogeneous data ordering (PCA-based) + LR peak 2x + AR self-gen GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 + Parallel Muon + LZMA9
